name: linSendSleepModFrm
title: linSendSleepModFrm
syntax: long linSendSleepModFrm (long silent, long restartScheduler, long wakeupIdentifier)
description: This function leads to a transmission of a go-to-sleep-command. Frame identifier and data byte values of that command depend on the used LIN specification:
Frame length is 2 bytes. The data bytes remain not changed.
Frame length is 8 bytes. The first data byte is set to 0, the other data bytes remain not changed.
Calling this function in the event procedure on preStart (parameter silent = 1) leads to measurement start in Sleep mode.

parameters.name: silent
parameters.description: When this flag is set the LIN hardware switches to Sleep mode without sending a go-to-sleep-command before. By this way the LIN hardware can be switched to Sleep mode even it is not the Master. So the BusIdle timeout is reduced.

return: On success, a value unequal to zero, otherwise zero.
